[cron:4f3f41fe-8d6d-4c47-aa01-e2e2cbc1c1ed 凌晨整理游戏资讯] 搜索前一天（昨天）的游戏行业资讯，包括新游发布、重要更新、行业动态、热门话题等。将整理好的内容保存到 /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/game-news-daily.md，格式为 Markdown，包含日期标题和分类内容。
Current time: Sunday, March 8th, 2026 — 12:00 AM (Asia/Shanghai)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
